chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-250 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl in d/o case 1.For orders on CMA 5384/24(U/A) 2.For orders on CMA 7262/23(Ex.A) 3.For orders on CMA 7263/23(Review) 25-09-2024 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate files power on behalf of petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Petitioner has moved this application seeking review of this Court’s order dated 31.08.2023, which is passed on Contempt Application made by petitioner himself being CMA 2850/2023, where it is alleged that after this Court’s order dated 22.02.2023, where respondents were directed to examine the case of the petitioner and issue appointment order within one month, but the same was not complied with. Learned counsel agrees that when said application was being heard, the respondents distorted the facts and attempted to seek an order which was contradictory to what this Court had already held on 22.02.2023, for which there was no legal rationale and the respondents never challenged order dated 22.02.2023 and the order dated 31.08.2023 was passed in absence of counsel for petitioner, as the petitioner was not very conversant with the legal complexities and became victim of the said order. Counsel states that the fact remains that this Court passed its order dated 22.02.2023, after comments having already been filed by the respondent No.3 and this Court was fully conscious about the legal position and merits, and only thereafter passed the order dated 22.02.2023. At the face of it, the petitioner appears to be a differently-able person and has been fighting for his rights since 2018 and after

Counsel states that the fact remains that this Court passed its order dated 22.02.2023, after comments having already been filed by the respondent No.3 and this Court was fully conscious about the legal position and merits, and only thereafter passed the order dated 22.02.2023. At the face of it, the petitioner appears to be a differently-able person and has been fighting for his rights since 2018 and after 2 numerous opportunities having been given to respondents, the beneficial order dated 22.02.2023 was passed. Counsel agrees that the order dated 31.08.2023 has taken away benefit that was granted to him. Counsel is not inclined to press Review Application rather re- agitates his earlier filed contempt application, to which notice be re- issued to alleged contemnors for 15.10.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
